节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability to start and manage child process.
Enum for the process start mode.
Fork child process by application self. Binder IPC can not be used in child process in this mode, may cause crash.
Fork child process by app spawn.
Start child process with the given src entry and start mode. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } srcEntry - Child process source file entrance to be started.
@param { StartMode } startMode - Child process start mode.
@returns { Promise<number> } Returns the started child process pid.
@throws { BusinessError } 16000062 - The number of child processes exceeds the upper limit.

parameters.说明: Child process source file entrance to be started.

节点.return_description: Returns the started child process pid.

error_codes.description: The number of child processes exceeds the upper limit.

节点.功能描述: Start child process with the given src entry and mode. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } srcEntry - Child process source file entrance to be started.
@param { StartMode } startMode - Child process start mode.
@param { AsyncCallback<number> } callback - The callback of startChildProcess.
@throws { BusinessError } 16000062 - The number of child processes exceeds the upper limit.

parameters.说明: Child process source file entrance to be started.

error_codes.description: The number of child processes exceeds the upper limit.

节点.功能描述: Start child process with the given args and options. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } srcEntry - Indicates child process source file entrance to be started.
@param { ChildProcessArgs } args - Indicates args to pass to child process.
@param { ChildProcessOptions } [options] - Indicates options for starting child process.
@returns { Promise<number> } Returns the started child process pid.
@throws { BusinessError } 16000062 - The number of child processes exceeds the upper limit.

parameters.说明: Indicates child process source file entrance to be started.
Indicates args to pass to child process.
ChildProcessOptions } [options] - Indicates options for starting child process.

节点.return_description: Returns the started child process pid.

error_codes.description: The number of child processes exceeds the upper limit.

节点.功能描述: Start native child process with the given args and options. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } entryPoint - Indicates entry point of child process, consisting of library and entry function, such as "libEntry.so:Main".
@param { ChildProcessArgs } args - Indicates args to pass to child process.
@param { ChildProcessOptions } [options] - Indicates options for starting child process.
@returns { Promise<number> } Returns the started child process pid.
@throws { BusinessError } 801 - Capability not supported. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.
@throws { BusinessError } 16000062 - The number of child processes exceeds the upper limit.
